title: Does My Secret Crush Have Feelings for Me? | Side x Side | Cut
text: ty can come off as ambiguous to people mm-hmm that's my whole life why do you think that is uh someone told me because i'm so nice and she said like straight guys are your friend asked you out today what do you say yeah if you're paying and we can go out as friends why haven't you asked him out yet i'm scared of rejection and i'm scared i'm going to look stupid if i tell him would you date her yeah no why not um i just feel like it's better to like not hold on to your past and like you know let things be why are you sleeping with her [Laughter] that's tough that's tough why haven't you asked him out i think i'm too nervous and also i feel like he would think it's a joke would you consider dating her yes you would but you don't have feelings for her yes well tell me how that works it would be worth a shot to see if there's anything there i'd say there's no harm do you want me to tell him that you have feelings for him yeah i think you should say it because i am definitely too afraid to say it to him i could be secretive i could just be done no you could tell her do you see where i was going with the question yes she has very strong feelings for you it makes a lot of sense not the way i don't want to find out i got permission to say this but you two both have feelings for each other what no way that's why they brought you here oh my god do you think if it doesn't work out that you still could be friends absolutely do you think this will destroy your friendship no i think that like i'll just get over it and then we'll just be back to like how we were before then so i don't think anything bad will happen out of this what do you do now with this knowledge conversation but not a bad one just communication is key yeah we're gonna talk yeah honestly we'll probably talk after this anyways she'd be like what'd they tell you and i'd be like i'm in love with you oh my god
